evidence_summary: [CH001_SC002] Purpose: Establish the inciting incident and the stakes (the gold claim).

[CH001_SC002] Continuity: Appearance of the gold vein, gear/clothing of 1865 prospectors, lighting (bright desert sun).

evidence_summary: [CH001_SC005] Purpose: Transition the protagonist from the terrestrial world to the inciting supernatural event.

[CH001_SC005] Summary: Carter's horse leads him to a narrow cave entrance on a high trail. After checking Powell, Carter enters the large, ancient chamber. Inside, he is overcome by an unnatural drowsiness and collapses into unconsciousness.
[CH001_SC005] Emotional arc: Exhaustion $\rightarrow$ Confusion $\rightarrow$ Lethargy/Loss of consciousness.
[CH001_SC005] Coverage: Wide shots of the cave entrance on the cliff, low-angle shots inside the chamber to emphasize scale, close-ups of Carter's eyes drooping, slow fade to black.
[CH001_SC005] Continuity: Lighting transition (from bright exterior to dark/dim cave), the "unnatural" quality of the drowsiness (visual cues like heavy eyelids or blurred vision).
